aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Focused but थोड़ा aggressive

💼 Career: Competition high rahega, tumhe push karega

❤️ Love: Tone control karna zaruri hai

💰 Money: खर्च impulsive ho sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Calm approach rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: जीत attitude se nahi, strategy se hoti hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable aur patient

💼 Career: Slow but strong progress

❤️ Love: Emotional comfort milega

💰 Money: Savings grow hogi

🧘 Advice: थोड़ा change accept karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Stability ke chakkar me stagnation aa jata hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: High but distracted

💼 Career: Opportunities milengi, par confusion bhi

❤️ Love: Mixed signals create ho sakte hain

💰 Money: Fluctuation possible

🧘 Advice: Ek direction choose karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: हर option opportunity nahi hota
cancer:
♋ Cancer

🔥 Energy: Sensitive aur thoughtful

💼 Career: Support system strong rahega

❤️ Love: Emotional clarity milegi

💰 Money: Safe planning best

🧘 Advice: Boundaries set karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har kisi ke liye over-give karna zaruri nahi
leo:
♌ Leo

🔥 Energy: Confident aur expressive

💼 Career: Spotlight mil sakta hai

❤️ Love: Passion high, par ego clash bhi

💰 Money: Smart risk fayda dega

🧘 Advice: Listen bhi karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sirf bolna nahi, samajhna bhi power hai
virgo:
♍ Virgo

🔥 Energy: Analytical aur tense

💼 Career: Overthinking se delay ho sakta hai

❤️ Love: छोटी baat pe stress

💰 Money: Stable but slow

🧘 Advice: Relax karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Perfection ke chakkar me progress rukti hai
libra:
♎ Libra

🔥 Energy: Social but indecisive

💼 Career: Collaboration se fayda

❤️ Love: Honest baat zaruri hogi

💰 Money: Neutral flow

🧘 Advice: Clear choice lo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Delay bhi ek loss hai
scorpio:
♏ Scorpio

🔥 Energy: Intense aur powerful

💼 Career: Strategic move se breakthrough

❤️ Love: Deep connection ya conflict

💰 Money: Sudden gain ya shift

🧘 Advice: Control chhodo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Sab kuch control karna possible nahi
sagittarius:
♐ Sagittarius

🔥 Energy: Restless aur curious

💼 Career: New path explore karne ka urge

❤️ Love: Commitment issues surface

💰 Money: Risk avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Discipline lao

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Freedom bina structure fail hoti hai
capricorn:
♑ Capricorn

🔥 Energy: Steady aur productive

💼 Career: Hard work ka clear result

❤️ Love: Stable but reserved

💰 Money: Financial growth strong

🧘 Advice: Emotions express karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Success ke saath connection bhi zaruri hai
aquarius:
♒ Aquarius

🔥 Energy: Innovative but detached

💼 Career: Unique ideas shine karenge

❤️ Love: Emotional gap feel ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Unexpected gain

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Ideas tabhi matter karte hain jab implement ho
pisces:
♓ Pisces

🔥 Energy: Dreamy but inconsistent

💼 Career: Creative flow strong, discipline weak

❤️ Love: Emotional bonding ya confusion

💰 Money: Slow growth
